# PolyTraderX

> PolyTraderX is a simulation-only strategy lab for crypto prediction markets. It lets traders test and refine trading strategies using real Polymarket market data and live Binance/CoinGecko spot prices — without placing real trades or risking capital.

## What PolyTraderX Does

PolyTraderX targets Polymarket's 5-minute and 15-minute crypto prediction markets (BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP). The core strategy is **late-minute certainty trading**: signals are generated only in the final 5–60 seconds of a market, when the outcome is near-certain (>92% confidence). All trades are simulated using real market data.

This is a strategy lab, not a live trading bot. No real orders are placed on Polymarket.

## Key Features

- Simulation engine that scans live Polymarket markets and generates paper trades based on your strategy parameters
- Fully configurable per-user strategy: risk limits, confidence thresholds, entry windows, monitored assets, market durations, and price feed source
- Two scan modes: System Scan (fast, rule-based, no AI cost) or AI Scan (AI confidence check on every potential trade)
- AI-powered loss audits: after every losing trade, AI reviews the decision and suggests strategy improvements
- AI daily and weekly performance reviews with actionable suggestions
- Subscription billing via NOWPayments (crypto only — BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, 100+ currencies)
- One-time 3-day free Pro trial for new users (no payment required)
- Telegram bot for real-time trade notifications and daily summaries

## Plans and Pricing

Plans are billed in cryptocurrency via NOWPayments. Prices are shown in USD equivalent.

- **Free Trial**: 3-day one-time Pro trial, no payment required. Full Pro access for 3 days, expires automatically.
- **Pro**: Paid monthly subscription. AI Muscles and Brain enabled. Increased signal and position limits.
- **Advanced**: Higher limits than Pro. Priority AI access.
- **Lifetime**: One-time payment. Permanent access at the highest tier.

## Supported Markets

- Polymarket 5-minute and 15-minute crypto prediction markets
- Supported assets: BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP
- Price data: Binance (default), CoinGecko, Coinbase, Kraken (user-selectable)

## How It Works

1. The scanner runs every minute and identifies markets in the final seconds before close
2. Your strategy rules are applied — price thresholds, confidence requirements, and position limits
3. If AI Scan mode is enabled, an AI confidence check is added before any trade is taken
4. Qualifying signals become simulated trades recorded against your balance
5. Open positions are monitored and settled against actual Polymarket outcomes
6. Losing trades trigger an AI audit that analyses the decision and suggests parameter improvements
7. Daily and weekly AI reviews summarise your strategy performance and flag patterns

## Telegram Bot Commands

- `/start ACCOUNT-ID` — Link your PolyTraderX account to receive notifications
- `/status` — Simulator status and today's trade summary
- `/today` — List of today's simulated trades
- `/balance` — Current simulated balance and equity
- `/unlink` — Disconnect this Telegram account
- `/help` — Show all available commands

## Payments

- All payments processed via NOWPayments
- Accepts 100+ cryptocurrencies including BTC, ETH, USDT, USDC, SOL
- No credit card or bank account required

## Account Security

- Optional two-factor authentication (2FA) for your account
- Google login supported in addition to email/password
- One Telegram account can only be linked to one PolyTraderX account at a time

## Contact and Support

For support, use the contact form at /contact or reach out via the Telegram bot once linked.
